title: EngagementState
description: Output of Model 2 (XGBoost Engagement Classifier). Calibrated probabilities.

engagement_state.description: Predicted engagement class from XGBoost (argmax of probabilities)

fatigue_risk.description: P(fatigued) from calibrated model. Used for formula-based decisions.

confidence.description: max(probabilities) — how certain the model is about its prediction.

alert_level.description: Deterministic alert derived from fatigue_risk threshold rules

cold_start.description: True if rule-based fallback was used instead of the trained model
